name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, complete packaging
Dreamy Purple in stock!!️
Original leather with sheepskin lining Lady Diana 4-compartment series, the latest spring/summer color, fresh style🆕, paired with the latest lettered shoulder strap😋, which adds points. The set comes with 6 letters⚠️, you can choose the buckles you like🙋🏻, no need to match a full set
size:20*8*17cm
